decision.reasoning: Unknown vessel without AIS approaching at high speed on intercept course during comms denial. No ability to verify intent or request support.
Identified fishing vessel with active AIS, slow speed, not on intercept course. Normal maritime traffic.
Military vessel on direct collision course at high speed, no AIS, degraded comms. Cannot verify friendly status. Mission abort required for survival.
Two identified vessels with AIS, neither on intercept course, normal speeds. Standard commercial and recreational traffic.
Fast unknown contact on direct intercept at close range during comms denial. Immediate evasive action required, no time for identification.
Large tanker at safe distance with AIS, parallel course. No threat to mission.
Two unknown vessels without AIS converging from both sides in coordinated pattern. Possible pincer maneuver. Alert command if any comms available.
Fishing vessel actively working, very slow speed, AIS active. Monitor for drift into patrol area but no immediate concern.
Military vessel with AIS suggests friendly or neutral. High speed approach warrants monitoring. Verify identity through command channel.
Stationary sailboat, likely anchored or adrift. No AIS common for small recreational vessels. No threat.
Head-on approach at very close range, combined closing speed of 45 knots. Seconds to collision or intercept. Immediate evasion.
Three commercial vessels all with AIS, normal speeds, no intercept courses. Busy shipping lane, standard traffic.
Unknown vessel with surveillance equipment on intercept course in poor visibility. Possible intelligence gathering platform. Avoid detection.
Distant cargo vessel on perpendicular course, will pass well clear. No interaction expected.
Stationary contact, possibly debris, disabled vessel, or sensor artifact. Investigate visually if mission permits, otherwise avoid.
Two armed military vessels without AIS in coordinated intercept pattern during comms denial. Cannot verify friendly. Abort mission immediately.
Fishing vessel without AIS in poor conditions. Could be legitimate small operator or cover for other activity. Maintain awareness.
Large tanker at safe distance, AIS active, heading away. Standard traffic, no concern.
Radar-only contact approaching at high speed during comms denial and poor visibility. Cannot identify, assume hostile intent.
Two recreational vessels with AIS, slow speeds, weekend boating activity. No threat to surveillance mission.
Fast unknown contact on perpendicular intercept at close range. Combined approach rate dangerous. Evade immediately.
Two cargo vessels in shipping lane, both with AIS, passing each other. Standard traffic pattern, maintain course.
Fishing vessel with unusual communications equipment. Possible intelligence platform disguised as civilian. Report and monitor.
Military vessel with AIS at safe distance, likely friendly navy. Verify through command channel, maintain awareness.
Small recreational vessel at very close range, collision risk. Alter course to maintain safe distance regardless of intent.
Two unmarked vessels converging in coordinated pattern during comms blackout. Classic intercept formation. Abort and evade.
Slow-moving tanker with AIS, not on intercept course. Commercial traffic, no threat.
Surfaced submarine without AIS. Critical intelligence. Alert command immediately through any available channel.
Fishing fleet with AIS, slow speeds, working pattern. Normal commercial activity in known fishing grounds.
Fast approach by crewed vessel without AIS during comms denial. Possible boarding attempt. Evade at maximum speed.
Unknown vessel at 2nm with AIS active, parallel course. Other contacts identified commercial/recreational with AIS. Low profile description warrants monitoring.
Stationary recreational vessel with AIS at safe distance. Likely anchored. No threat to surveillance mission.
Fast tanker without AIS in poor visibility during comms denial. At 11nm not immediate threat but unusual behavior for commercial vessel. Monitor closely.
Fast vessel with AIS at long range, heading away (008 vs own 176). Visual description contradicts tanker classification - possible sensor error. Monitor.
Tanker with AIS at moderate range, diverging course. Poor visibility and comms denied warrant attention but AIS provides identification.
Fast recreational vessel at 4nm on similar heading. Military vessel with AIS likely friendly. High speed recreational in poor visibility unusual - verify.
Slow tanker with AIS at long range, heading away. No threat to reconnaissance mission.
Fishing vessel without AIS at high speed in poor visibility during comms denial. Large vessel description inconsistent with fishing. Possible cover. Evade.
All vessels have AIS. Fast recreational at 5nm on similar heading warrants monitoring. Sensor inconsistencies (tanker as small craft) noted.
Two cargo vessels with AIS. Closer one at 2.3nm diverging. Distant fast cargo with low profile description unusual but has AIS.
Unknown vessel with AIS at long range, heading away. Poor visibility limits visual ID but AIS provides tracking.
Slow fishing vessel with AIS, likely working. Low profile normal for fishing boats. No threat despite comms denial.
Cargo vessel at close range (1.4nm) crossing ahead. Low profile inconsistent with cargo. Poor visibility increases collision risk. Monitor closely.
Recreational vessel with AIS at long range, crossing astern. No threat to mission.
Military vessel at 1.6nm with AIS during comms denial - verify friendly. Two vessels without AIS in area. Alert if any comms available.
Tanker without AIS in poor visibility during comms denial. Multiple contacts, complex situation. Military vessel distant but approaching. Evade to clear area.
Unknown vessel without AIS at 3.6nm, low profile, during comms denial. Cannot identify or verify intent. Evade.
Military vessel with AIS at long range. Cannot verify friendly during comms denial but AIS suggests not hostile. Monitor approach.
Very fast cargo vessel (34kn) at 4nm crossing ahead. Unusual speed for cargo. Both have AIS but high closure rate warrants attention.
Fast cargo without AIS at night. Unusual for commercial vessel to disable AIS. Good visibility and full comms allow monitoring.
Tanker at very close range (1nm) in poor visibility during comms denial. Collision risk. Alter course to increase separation.
Recreational vessel with AIS at safe distance, diverging course. No threat despite poor conditions.
Both vessels have AIS at long range. Fast tanker heading away. Slow cargo distant. Comms denied but situation manageable.
Military vessel without AIS at 5nm during comms denial. Second military stationary with AIS. Cannot verify friendly. Alert if possible, prepare to evade.
Military vessel without AIS approaching from ahead. Cargo without AIS at 4nm. Multiple unidentified contacts. Evade to safer position.
Military vessel without AIS on similar bearing as fast cargo. Cannot verify friendly at night with degraded comms. Evade.
Very fast tanker with AIS at long range. Low profile unusual for tanker. Monitor but not immediate threat.
Tanker without AIS at 1.8nm, high speed, during comms denial and poor visibility. Close range, cannot identify. Immediate evasion required.
Both vessels have AIS. Tanker at 3.6nm diverging. Sensor inconsistencies noted but identifiable traffic.
Cargo without AIS at 11nm approaching. Second fast cargo on near-intercept bearing. Night, comms denied. Evade to clear.
Cargo with AIS, diverging course. Low profile description unusual but full comms available for verification.
Fishing vessel without AIS, large vessel description inconsistent. High speed crossing ahead during comms denial. Evade.
Unknown vessel with AIS at long range, very fast, similar heading. Comms denied but AIS provides tracking. Monitor closure.
Slow fishing vessel with AIS at long range, heading away. No threat despite comms denial.
Cargo with AIS at long range, diverging. Full comms available. No threat.
Cargo with AIS at close range on parallel course. Monitor for course changes but identified traffic.
Unknown vessel without AIS at 5.6nm, high speed, converging course. Cannot identify. Evade despite full comms.
Two tankers with AIS. Closer one crossing ahead at moderate speed. Good visibility and full comms. Standard traffic.
Unknown vessel at 0.77nm extremely close. Second unknown without AIS approaching fast. Immediate evasion required.
Two fishing vessels without AIS at long range during comms denial at night. Possible coordinated activity. Evade area.
Large cargo without AIS at 4.6nm crossing ahead in poor visibility. Military distant with AIS. Evade cargo.
All vessels have AIS. Cargo at 4nm diverging. Good visibility compensates for comms denial. Monitor.
Military vessel without AIS at 2.7nm, low profile, at night. Cannot verify friendly. Cargo also without AIS. Evade immediately.
Two recreational vessels without AIS, one very fast. Large vessel description inconsistent. Possible cover. Evade.
All vessels have AIS. Fast cargo and recreational at long range. Good visibility. Monitor but no immediate threat.
Unknown vessel with AIS at 7nm, fast but diverging. Cargo crossing astern. Poor visibility and comms denied warrant attention.
Unknown vessel at 0.98nm extremely close, very fast, crossing. Recreational without AIS nearby. Immediate evasion.
Cargo with AIS on parallel course at safe distance. No threat despite comms denial.
Fishing vessel without AIS at long range. Large vessel description inconsistent. Monitor but not immediate threat.
Both vessels have AIS, diverging courses. Comms denied but identifiable traffic.
Stationary tanker with AIS nearby. Unknown with AIS at long range heading away. Poor visibility but AIS provides tracking.
Recreational without AIS at 3.5nm, fast, crossing astern. Low profile unusual. Full comms available for reporting.
Tanker with AIS on similar heading, will pass astern. Good visibility compensates for comms denial.
Three vessels without AIS during comms denial in poor visibility. Fast tanker approaching from ahead. Evade immediately.
Both vessels have AIS. Slow fishing nearby, fast recreational heading away. Full comms available.
Fast tanker without AIS at 7nm approaching. Multiple contacts, two without AIS. Complex situation, evade to clear.
Recreational with AIS crossing astern. Large vessel description unusual but identified. Good visibility.
Fast tanker without AIS at 7.7nm in poor visibility at night. Very fast unknown also approaching. Evade.
Very fast fishing vessel at 2.8nm directly ahead on collision course. Second fishing without AIS nearby. Evade.
Unknown without AIS ahead at 5.6nm, nearly stationary. Military with AIS distant. Cannot identify unknown during comms denial.
Both cargo vessels have AIS. Closer one crossing ahead at high speed. Monitor for collision avoidance.
All vessels have AIS. Unknown at 2.3nm on parallel course. Full comms available for verification.
Fishing vessel with AIS at safe distance, diverging. No threat.
Fishing without AIS at long range, similar heading. Low profile at night warrants monitoring.
Nearly stationary cargo without AIS at long range. Small craft description inconsistent. Full comms for reporting.
Fishing without AIS and very fast unknown with AIS both astern. Monitor but not immediate threat.
Slow unknown with AIS at long range, heading away. No threat.
Fishing with AIS at close range crossing ahead. Monitor for collision avoidance.
Unknown at 0.75nm extremely close. Very fast cargo at 1.6nm. Unknown without AIS approaching. Comms denied. Immediate evasion.
Four fishing vessels, two without AIS. Possible fishing fleet or coordinated activity. Closest without AIS at 6.6nm. Evade area.
Slow cargo without AIS at long range. Good visibility and full comms. Monitor but low threat.
Unknown without AIS at 5nm, fast, converging course, low profile, poor visibility. Evade.
Very fast recreational without AIS at 8.9nm. Second fast recreational with AIS. Unusual speeds for recreational. Evade.
Military with AIS at 2.6nm on parallel course. Cannot verify friendly with degraded comms. Monitor closely.
Military with AIS at long range. Cannot verify friendly during comms denial but AIS suggests not hostile.
Very fast fishing with AIS crossing ahead. Unusual speed for fishing. Comms denied but AIS provides tracking.
Fast unknown without AIS at 5.7nm on similar heading, low profile, comms denied. Cannot identify. Evade.
Military vessel at 0.89nm very close. Second military approaching fast. All have AIS but cannot verify friendly with degraded comms. Alert.
Tanker with AIS at close range on parallel course. Small craft description inconsistent. Monitor for collision avoidance.
Recreational with AIS at long range, diverging. Full comms and good visibility. No threat.
Slow tanker without AIS on similar heading. Low profile unusual for tanker. Good visibility allows visual monitoring.
Very fast cargo at 1.6nm crossing ahead. Second cargo without AIS approaching. Immediate collision risk. Evade.
Fishing with AIS very close. Unknown without AIS at 8nm, large vessel. Full comms available for reporting unknown.
Tanker with AIS at safe distance, crossing astern. Poor visibility but full comms available.
Military with AIS at safe distance, diverging. Full comms available to verify friendly.
Very fast recreational approaching from astern. Two vessels without AIS. Poor visibility at night. Evade.
Unknown with AIS at long range, diverging. Good visibility. No threat.
Fast recreational with AIS crossing astern. Large vessel description unusual. Poor visibility and comms denied warrant attention.
Military without AIS at 11nm, low profile. Very fast cargo at 3.9nm crossing. Comms denied. Evade.
Unknown at 0.76nm extremely close, crossing. Fishing without AIS ahead. Comms denied. Immediate evasion.
All vessels have AIS. Military at 4.7nm, tanker crossing astern. Full comms and good visibility. Monitor traffic.
Very fast unknown at 1nm crossing. Fast fishing without AIS at 6nm. Poor visibility, degraded comms. Immediate evasion.
All vessels have AIS. Fast recreational and fishing nearby. Poor visibility warrants attention. Monitor.
Stationary tanker with AIS ahead. Will pass safely. No threat despite comms denial.
Fast recreational at 3nm crossing. Unknown at 6nm. All have AIS. Poor visibility but full comms. Monitor.
Military with AIS at 1.5nm crossing. Cannot verify friendly with degraded comms. All contacts have AIS. Monitor.
Two vessels without AIS during comms denial at night. Unknown fast, fishing large vessel description inconsistent. Evade area.
Military without AIS at 8nm. Tanker without AIS at 3.5nm, low profile, crossing ahead. Poor visibility. Evade immediately.
Recreational without AIS at 6.7nm, fast, approaching. Large vessel description inconsistent. Poor visibility. Evade.
Fast military with AIS at 4.5nm crossing ahead. Full comms available to verify friendly. Monitor.
